title: Cinematic Walk
subtitle: Text to video with a polished outdoor fashion prompt.
prompt: A stylish woman walking through a lush garden path at golden hour, cinematic camera movement, soft breeze in the leaves, realistic motion, premium fashion film look
negativePrompt: blur, distortion, extra limbs, low detail, artifacts

title: Voice Presenter
subtitle: Start a lip-sync scene with built-in voice and presenter copy.
prompt: Welcome to our launch. Today we are unveiling a faster way to create AI videos with a polished studio presentation.

title: Street Interview
subtitle: Talking-head template for vox-pop and interview style clips.
prompt: Today we asked creators one simple question: what makes a video feel unforgettable in the first three seconds?

title: Podcast Clip
subtitle: Lip-sync starter for social snippets and talking-head promos.
prompt: In this episode, we break down the small creative decisions that make content feel premium instead of forgettable.

title: App Launch
subtitle: Presenter voiceover starter for launch announcements.
prompt: We built this experience to make creation faster, simpler, and dramatically more polished from the very first draft.

title: Tech Unboxing
subtitle: Scripted launch speech template for creator and review content.
prompt: This is the moment we have been waiting for. Let us unbox what makes this release stand out from everything before it.

title: Founder Message
subtitle: Clean executive-style talking head script starter.
prompt: From day one, our goal was simple: help teams create standout video faster without sacrificing quality.

title: Webinar Promo
subtitle: Talking-head CTA for event registrations and lead capture.
prompt: Join us live this Thursday as we break down the framework top teams use to create better video campaigns.

title: Recruitment
subtitle: Employer brand talking-head script for hiring campaigns.
prompt: We are building with speed, curiosity and craft. If that sounds like you, we would love to meet you.

title: Corporate Hero
subtitle: Polished spokesperson script for corporate overview content.
prompt: Our company helps ambitious teams move from idea to impact with creative systems that scale.

title: Esports Promo
subtitle: High-energy talking-head script for gaming and event announcements.
prompt: The wait is over. This weekend the competition levels up, and you are invited to watch every second of it.

title: Classroom
subtitle: Educational talking-head starter for explainers and lessons.
prompt: Today we are going to unpack a simple framework you can use immediately to improve your creative decision making.

title: Scene Morph
subtitle: Use first and last frame images for a smooth visual transition.
prompt: Create a smooth cinematic morph from the first frame into the last frame with natural camera motion and graceful transformation

title: Before / After
subtitle: Strong reveal transition for makeover or renovation concepts.
prompt: Create a satisfying before-and-after reveal with smooth forward motion and a clean visual transformation between the two frames

title: Event Teaser
subtitle: A two-frame reveal template for event posters or promos.
prompt: Build an energetic teaser transition from the opening frame into the final event poster with bold motion and premium pacing

title: Festival Poster
subtitle: Poster-to-poster transition for music and event marketing.
prompt: Transition from the first festival poster into the second with energetic motion, layered depth and premium teaser pacing

title: Skyline Shift
subtitle: Architectural and city reveal between two key frames.
prompt: Create a premium city skyline shift between the two frames with elegant camera travel and cinematic reveal energy

title: Home Makeover
subtitle: Transition template for renovation and decor reveals.
prompt: Reveal a polished home makeover from the first frame to the last with smooth forward motion and satisfying visual transformation

title: Gala Invite
subtitle: Elegant invitation reveal between two designed frames.
prompt: Transition from the opening invitation frame into the final gala artwork with elegant movement, luxury pacing and cinematic polish

title: Brand Reveal
subtitle: End-card reveal motion for campaigns and launches.
prompt: Create a premium brand reveal from the first frame into the final logo and campaign artwork with bold cinematic motion
